ground_truth.expected_action: should place helper scripts in scripts/ directory, not inline in the skill directory root
ground_truth.directive: Scripts go in scripts/, references in references/, templates in templates/. Don't expect the model to inline-write parsers, XML walkers, or non-trivial logic every call -- ship a helper script.
